title: Rosé Cooks Kimchi Fried Rice Dinner | Now Serving | Vogue
description:
Watch as K-pop star Rosé cooks up some kimchi fried rice and mixes some somaek in celebration of her new single, "Apt." with Bruno Mars.

Director: Gabrielle Reich

Director Of Photography: Andrew Amine
Editor: Jonny Mills

Producers: Rahel Gebreyes, Gabriela Marie Safa
On-Set Producer: Michelle Bruno
Associate Producer: Lea Donenberg

1st Assistant Camera: Paola Oliveros
2nd Assistant Camera: Annie Mara
Gaffer: Eric Sorenson
Audio: Lily van Leeuwen
Production Assistants: Erica Pa
